metadata.name: meridian
metadata.description: Binary stock outcome trading on Solana

accounts.name: escrow_vault
docs: USDC escrow vault — refund source for USDC bids

accounts.name: yes_escrow
docs: Yes token escrow — refund source for Yes asks

accounts.name: no_escrow
docs: No token escrow — refund source for No-backed bids

accounts.name: user_usdc_ata
docs: User's USDC ATA (refund dest for side=0)

accounts.name: user_yes_ata
docs: User's Yes ATA (refund dest for side=1)

accounts.name: user_no_ata
docs: User's No ATA (refund dest for side=2)

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury USDC account — receives escrow dust

accounts.name: sol_treasury
docs: Validated via config.sol_treasury.

accounts.name: escrow_vault
docs: USDC escrow vault — refund source for USDC bids (side=0)

accounts.name: yes_escrow
docs: Yes token escrow — refund source for Yes asks (side=1)

accounts.name: no_escrow
docs: No token escrow — refund source for No-backed bids (side=2)

accounts.name: creator
docs: Market creator — can be anyone (admin or regular user).
Non-admin creators pay a strike_creation_fee if configured.

accounts.name: usdc_vault
docs: USDC collateral vault — holds $1 × pairs minted

accounts.name: escrow_vault
docs: USDC escrow for bid orders (side=0)

accounts.name: yes_escrow
docs: Yes token escrow for ask orders (side=1)

accounts.name: no_escrow
docs: No token escrow for No-backed bid orders (side=2)

accounts.name: order_book
docs: Address verified via PDA derivation in handler.

accounts.name: creator_usdc_ata
docs: Creator's USDC ATA — fee is deducted from here for non-admin creators.
Optional: only required when creator != admin && strike_creation_fee > 0.

accounts.name: fee_vault
docs: Fee vault — receives strike creation fees.

accounts.name: ticker_registry
docs: TickerRegistry — validates ticker is active.
Optional for backward compat: if not provided, falls back to GlobalConfig.tickers.

accounts.name: sol_treasury
docs: Validated via config.sol_treasury in handler.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: Mock USDC mint (or real USDC on mainnet)

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury USDC account owned by config PDA — receives escrow dust from closed markets

accounts.name: fee_vault
docs: Fee vault USDC account owned by config PDA — receives protocol fees from fills

accounts.name: sol_treasury
docs: Created inline via invoke_signed (system account, not token account).

accounts.name: user_usdc_ata
docs: User's USDC token account — source of deposit

accounts.name: user_yes_ata
docs: User's Yes token account — created if needed. Position constraint: must be 0.

accounts.name: user_no_ata
docs: User's No token account — created if needed. Must have zero balance (checked in handler).

accounts.name: usdc_vault
docs: USDC collateral vault

accounts.name: usdc_vault
docs: USDC collateral vault (for merge/burn debits)

accounts.name: escrow_vault
docs: USDC escrow for bid orders

accounts.name: yes_escrow
docs: Yes token escrow for ask orders

accounts.name: no_escrow
docs: No token escrow for No-backed bid orders

accounts.name: user_usdc_ata
docs: User's USDC ATA (escrow source for side=0, payout dest for merge/burn)

accounts.name: user_yes_ata
docs: User's Yes ATA (escrow source for side=1, receipt for swap fills)

accounts.name: user_no_ata
docs: User's No ATA (escrow source for side=2, position constraint for side=0)

accounts.name: fee_vault
docs: Fee vault — collects protocol fees from fills

accounts.name: user_usdc_ata
docs: User's USDC ATA — payout destination

accounts.name: user_yes_ata
docs: User's Yes ATA

accounts.name: user_no_ata
docs: User's No ATA

accounts.name: fee_vault
docs: Fee vault USDC account (PDA-owned)

accounts.name: admin_usdc_ata
docs: Admin's USDC ATA to receive fees

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury USDC account (config PDA authority)

accounts.name: admin_usdc_ata
docs: Admin's USDC ATA to receive surplus USDC

accounts.name: sol_treasury
docs: Validated via config.sol_treasury.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Non-admin calling admin-only instruction

errors.name: InvalidAuthority
errors.msg: Oracle update from non-authority wallet

errors.name: SignerMismatch
errors.msg: Transaction signer doesn't match expected account owner

errors.name: ConfigAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: GlobalConfig has already been initialized

errors.name: OracleFeedAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Oracle feed for this ticker has already been initialized

errors.name: InvalidTicker
errors.msg: Ticker not in GlobalConfig tickers list

errors.name: InvalidMarketCloseTime
errors.msg: Market close time is in the past

errors.name: InvalidStrikePrice
errors.msg: Strike price cannot be zero

errors.name: InvalidStalenessThreshold
errors.msg: Staleness threshold cannot be zero

errors.name: InvalidConfidenceThreshold
errors.msg: Confidence bps must be between 1 and 10000

errors.name: MarketAlreadySettled
errors.msg: Market has already been settled

errors.name: MarketNotSettled
errors.msg: Market has not been settled

errors.name: MarketPaused
errors.msg: Global trading is paused

errors.name: AlreadyPaused
errors.msg: Target is already paused

errors.name: NotPaused
errors.msg: Target is not paused

errors.name: MarketClosed
errors.msg: Market has been closed

errors.name: InvalidMint
errors.msg: Token account mint doesn't match expected mint

errors.name: InvalidVault
errors.msg: Vault account doesn't match market's stored vault

errors.name: InvalidEscrow
errors.msg: Escrow account doesn't match market's stored escrow

errors.name: InvalidOrderBook
errors.msg: Order book doesn't match market's stored order book

errors.name: InvalidMarket
errors.msg: Market PDA doesn't match order book's stored market

errors.name: AccountNotInitialized
errors.msg: Required account has not been initialized

errors.name: InvalidProgramId
errors.msg: CPI target doesn't match expected program

errors.name: InsufficientAccounts
errors.msg: Not enough remaining_accounts for fill settlement

errors.name: InvalidMakerAccount
errors.msg: Maker token account owner does not match fill maker

errors.name: OracleStale
errors.msg: Oracle price is stale — exceeds staleness threshold

errors.name: OracleConfidenceTooWide
errors.msg: Oracle confidence band is too wide

errors.name: OracleNotInitialized
errors.msg: Oracle price feed has not been initialized

errors.name: OraclePriceInvalid
errors.msg: Oracle price is zero or invalid

errors.name: OracleProgramMismatch
errors.msg: Oracle program ID doesn't match GlobalConfig

errors.name: InvalidOracleDiscriminator
errors.msg: Oracle account discriminator does not match PriceFeed

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient balance to cover order or mint deposit

errors.name: OrderBookFull
errors.msg: All order slots at this price level are full

errors.name: InvalidPrice
errors.msg: Price must be between 1 and 99

errors.name: InvalidQuantity
errors.msg: Quantity must be at least 1 token (1_000_000 lamports)

errors.name: OrderNotFound
errors.msg: Order not found at specified price level and order ID

errors.name: OrderNotOwned
errors.msg: Cannot cancel someone else's order

errors.name: NoFillsAvailable
errors.msg: No matching orders available for market order

errors.name: InvalidOrderType
errors.msg: Order type must be Market (0) or Limit (1)

errors.name: InvalidSide
errors.msg: Order side must be 0 (Buy Yes), 1 (Sell Yes), or 2 (Sell No)

errors.name: ConflictingPosition
errors.msg: Conflicting position — cannot hold both Yes and No tokens

errors.name: VaultBalanceMismatch
errors.msg: Vault balance doesn't match (total_minted - total_redeemed) — invariant violation

errors.name: MintSupplyMismatch
errors.msg: Yes mint supply != No mint supply — invariant violation

errors.name: InsufficientVaultBalance
errors.msg: Vault cannot cover redemption payout

errors.name: TokenTransferFailed
errors.msg: SPL token transfer failed

errors.name: TokenMintFailed
errors.msg: SPL token mint_to failed

errors.name: TokenBurnFailed
errors.msg: SPL token burn failed

errors.name: ATACreationFailed
errors.msg: Associated token account creation failed

errors.name: SettlementTooEarly
errors.msg: Settlement too early — market has not closed yet

errors.name: AdminSettleTooEarly
errors.msg: Admin settle too early — must wait 1 hour after market close

errors.name: OverrideWindowExpired
errors.msg: Override window has expired — outcome is final

errors.name: InvalidOutcome
errors.msg: Invalid outcome value

errors.name: MaxOverridesExceeded
errors.msg: Maximum override count (3) exceeded — outcome is final

errors.name: RedemptionBlockedOverride
errors.msg: Redemption blocked during override window — try again after deadline

errors.name: NoTokensToRedeem
errors.msg: No tokens to redeem

errors.name: InvalidRedemptionMode
errors.msg: Invalid redemption mode

errors.name: CrankNotNeeded
errors.msg: Order book is already empty — crank not needed

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: DivisionByZero
errors.msg: Division by zero

errors.name: CloseMarketNotSettled
errors.msg: Cannot close an unsettled market

errors.name: CloseMarketOverrideActive
errors.msg: Cannot close market while override window is active

errors.name: CloseMarketOrderBookNotEmpty
errors.msg: Cannot close market with resting orders — run crank_cancel first

errors.name: InvalidOracleType
errors.msg: Oracle type flag not recognized

errors.name: MintSupplyNotZero
errors.msg: Cannot close market — tokens still outstanding

errors.name: AltAlreadySet
errors.msg: Market ALT address has already been set

errors.name: FeeBpsOutOfRange
errors.msg: Fee basis points exceeds maximum (1000 = 10%)

errors.name: FeeTransferFailed
errors.msg: Fee vault CPI transfer failed

errors.name: CrankRedeemOverrideActive
errors.msg: Redemption blocked — override window still active

errors.name: CrankRedeemEmpty
errors.msg: No tokens were redeemed in this batch

errors.name: NoPendingAdmin
errors.msg: No pending admin transfer to accept

errors.name: NotPendingAdmin
errors.msg: Signer does not match pending admin

errors.name: WithdrawalExceedsAvailable
errors.msg: Withdrawal exceeds available balance (balance - obligations - reserve)

errors.name: TickerAlreadyExists
errors.msg: Ticker already exists in the registry

errors.name: TickerNotFound
errors.msg: Ticker not found in the registry

errors.name: TickerDeactivated
errors.msg: Ticker has been deactivated

errors.name: PythValidationRequired
errors.msg: Invalid oracle type for Pyth feed validation

errors.name: InvalidPythFeed
errors.msg: Pyth price account is not valid or has no recent data

errors.name: UnsettledMarketsExist
errors.msg: Cannot switch to Mock oracle while unsettled markets exist

errors.name: InvalidOperatingReserve
errors.msg: Invalid operating reserve value

errors.name: InvalidBlackoutMinutes
errors.msg: Settlement blackout must be 0-60 minutes

errors.name: InsufficientTreasuryRent
errors.msg: Treasury has insufficient SOL for rent

errors.name: MockOracleAdminRequired
errors.msg: Admin signer required when oracle_type is Mock

errors.name: OrderBookTooSmall
errors.msg: Order book account data is too small for header

errors.name: OrderBookDiscriminatorMismatch
errors.msg: Order book discriminator mismatch

errors.name: InsufficientRentDeposit
errors.msg: Insufficient SOL for order book rent deposit

errors.name: MaxLevelsReached
errors.msg: Order book has reached maximum level capacity

errors.name: OrderBookAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Order book already initialized

fields.name: maker_side
docs: 0=USDC bid, 1=Yes ask, 2=No-backed bid

fields.name: taker_side
docs: 0=USDC bid, 1=Yes ask, 2=No-backed bid

fields.name: is_merge
docs: True if fill was a merge/burn (No-backed bid matched Yes ask)

fields.name: fee
docs: Protocol fee deducted from USDC flow on this fill

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin authority

fields.name: usdc_mint
docs: Mock USDC mint on devnet (real USDC on mainnet)

fields.name: oracle_program
docs: Mock oracle program ID

fields.name: staleness_threshold
docs: Max oracle age for general ops (default 60s)

fields.name: settlement_staleness
docs: Max oracle age for settlement (default 120s)

fields.name: confidence_bps
docs: Max confidence band as basis points of price (default 50 = 0.5%)

fields.name: is_paused
docs: Global pause flag

fields.name: oracle_type
docs: Oracle type: 0=Mock, 1=Pyth

fields.name: tickers
docs: Supported tickers (7 MAG7, padded to 8 bytes each)

fields.name: ticker_count
docs: Number of active tickers

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump

fields.name: fee_bps
docs: Protocol fee in basis points (max 1000 = 10%), applied to both sides of every fill

fields.name: _padding
docs: Alignment padding

fields.name: strike_creation_fee
docs: Fee in USDC lamports charged to non-admin users creating strike markets

fields.name: pending_admin
docs: Proposed new admin (two-step transfer). Pubkey::default() = no pending transfer.

fields.name: operating_reserve
docs: Admin-configurable SOL reserve for next-day market creation float

fields.name: obligations
docs: Total USDC obligations owed to users from settled markets

fields.name: settlement_blackout_minutes
docs: Settlement blackout window in minutes (0 = no blackout)

fields.name: override_window_secs
docs: Override window in seconds (default 1). Admin-configurable via update_config.

fields.name: _padding2
docs: Padding for 8-byte alignment

fields.name: sol_treasury
docs: SOL Treasury PDA pubkey

fields.name: slot_rent_markup
docs: Configurable SOL markup per order slot (covers lifecycle tx fees)

fields.name: outcome
docs: 1=YesWins, 2=NoWins

fields.name: config
docs: Parent GlobalConfig

fields.name: yes_mint
docs: Yes token mint

fields.name: no_mint
docs: No token mint

fields.name: usdc_vault
docs: USDC collateral vault (holds $1 × pairs minted)

fields.name: escrow_vault
docs: USDC escrow for bid orders (side=0)

fields.name: yes_escrow
docs: Yes token escrow for ask orders (side=1)

fields.name: no_escrow
docs: No token escrow for No-backed bid orders (side=2)

fields.name: order_book
docs: OrderBook account

fields.name: oracle_feed
docs: PriceFeed oracle account

fields.name: strike_price
docs: Strike price in USDC lamports (e.g., 680_000_000 = $680.00)

fields.name: market_close_unix
docs: UTC timestamp for 4 PM ET on this trading day

fields.name: total_minted
docs: Total pairs minted (in token lamports)

fields.name: total_redeemed
docs: Total pairs redeemed

fields.name: settlement_price
docs: Oracle price at settlement (0 if unsettled)

fields.name: previous_close
docs: Reference price for display (previous close)

fields.name: settled_at
docs: Settlement timestamp (0 if unsettled)

fields.name: override_deadline
docs: settled_at + 3600; admin can override until this time. 0 if unsettled.

fields.name: alt_address
docs: Address Lookup Table for this market (set post-creation via set_market_alt)

fields.name: ticker
docs: Stock ticker (UTF-8, zero-padded)

fields.name: is_settled
docs: Whether market has been settled

fields.name: outcome
docs: 0=unsettled, 1=YesWins, 2=NoWins

fields.name: override_count
docs: Number of overrides used (max 3)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump

fields.name: _padding
docs: Alignment padding

types.name: TickerEntry
docs: A single entry in the TickerRegistry.
48 bytes per entry (8 ticker + 1 is_active + 32 pyth_feed + 7 padding).

fields.name: ticker
docs: Ticker symbol, null-padded to 8 bytes (e.g., b"AAPL\0\0\0\0")

fields.name: is_active
docs: Whether this ticker is active (admin can deactivate for moderation)

fields.name: pyth_feed
docs: Pyth price feed account address (Pubkey::default() when oracle_type == Mock)

fields.name: _padding
docs: Reserved padding for alignment

types.name: TickerRegistry
docs: Dynamic ticker registry PDA. Grows via realloc as tickers are added.
Account layout:
8 (discriminator) + 1 (bump) + 7 (padding) + N * 48 (entries)
Seeds: ["tickers"]

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump

fields.name: _padding
docs: Reserved padding

fields.name: entries
docs: Dynamic list of ticker entries
